I want a large iced coffee with oat milk and two sugars, please.
Do you have any vegetarian or gluten-free options on the lunch menu?
This restaurant is famous for its delicious spicy chicken wings.
I would like to reserve a table for four people tonight at seven o'clock.
The service here is very slow, and my food is completely cold.
Can I get the check please? I want to pay with my credit card.
I am cooking spaghetti and baking garlic bread for dinner tonight.
My sister loves sweet desserts, but I prefer salty snacks like popcorn.
Is tap water free here, or do I have to buy a bottle?
I am allergic to peanuts, so please make sure there are none in my food.
I am stuck in heavy traffic on the highway right now, so I will arrive about twenty minutes late.
Where is the train station? I need to buy a ticket to New York.
My flight to Chicago was delayed for three hours because of the heavy snow storm.
Do I need a passport to travel to Canada, or is a driver's license okay?
Excuse me, is this seat next to you taken or can I sit here?
I lost my suitcase at the airport baggage claim, and it contains all my clothes.
We should rent a car for our weekend trip to the mountains.
The subway is very crowded during rush hour in the morning.
Can you call a taxi for me? My cell phone battery is completely dead.
I love riding my bicycle through the park when the weather is warm and sunny.
Have you seen my black wallet? I think I left it on the kitchen table this morning.
I always wake up at six in the morning, stretch, and then make breakfast.
Don't forget to feed the dog and water the plants before you leave the house.
My apartment is on the fifth floor, but the elevator is broken today.
I need to wash my dirty clothes because I have nothing left to wear tomorrow.
Can you help me move this heavy couch to the living room?
I forgot my house keys inside, and now I am locked out in the cold.
Every Saturday morning, I clean my entire house, vacuum the floor, and wash dishes.
The hot water in the shower isn't working, it is completely freezing.
I like to read a book for thirty minutes before I go to sleep at night.
My computer screen suddenly went completely blank, and now it won't turn back on at all.
Can you text me the address of the restaurant? I don't know how to get there.
The Wi-Fi internet password here is written on the small whiteboard near the door.
I accidentally dropped my new smartphone on the floor, and the screen cracked.
My email inbox is completely full of spam messages that I need to delete.
I am recording a video message for my friend who lives in France.
Please mute your microphone during the online video meeting unless you are talking.
I need to download a new app on my phone to track my daily workouts.
My laptop battery is dying fast, do you have a charger I can borrow?
I don't like using social media because it wastes too much of my time.
I need to take my dog to the vet today because he has been sick and refusing to eat since yesterday.
My head hurts badly and I have a fever, so I am going to stay home from work today.
You need to take this medicine twice a day with food for one week.
I twisted my ankle while running in the park, and now it is very swollen.
Where is the nearest pharmacy? I need to buy some allergy pills.
I have an appointment to see my dentist for a teeth cleaning tomorrow morning.
My eyes are very dry and tired from staring at my computer screen all day.
Is this clinic open on weekends, or is it closed on Saturdays and Sundays?
I need to drink more water every day because the doctor said I am dehydrated.
My grandmother is recovering well in the hospital after her knee surgery last week.
I worked at my previous company for five years as a software engineer before moving to this city.
Our boss scheduled an important staff meeting tomorrow afternoon at two o'clock.
I cannot come to the phone right now because I am giving a presentation to a new client.
I need to print thirty copies of this project report before the meeting starts.
I applied for a new job online yesterday, and today they called me for an interview.
My co-worker is helping me finish this difficult project before the deadline on Friday.
I am so stressed because I have a huge workload and not enough time to finish it.
Do you want to eat lunch together in the cafeteria or go out to a restaurant?
I received a promotion at work today, so now I am the new marketing manager.
I need to sign this contract and scan it back to the human resources department.
The news says it is going to rain heavily tomorrow morning, so don't forget your umbrella.
The weather today is very beautiful, warm, and clear without any clouds.
It is freezing outside tonight, so make sure you wear a heavy coat, scarf, and gloves.
Look at the sky! There is a beautiful rainbow over the mountains after the storm.
The autumn leaves are changing color from green to beautiful bright red and yellow.
I hate humid weather because it makes me sweat instantly when I walk outside.
A severe thunderstorm is coming tonight, we should stay safe indoors.
The summer heat is too strong today, I want to swim in the pool to cool down.
There is a thick layer of white snow covering the grass and trees this morning.
The wind is blowing very hard right now, and it knocked over our garbage can outside.
I go to the gym to lift weights every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday after work.
The music concert last night was incredibly loud, but the band played amazingly well and the crowd loved it.
My favorite hobby is painting landscape pictures with watercolor on large canvas.
Our local soccer team won the championship game last night, and everyone celebrated.
I bought two tickets to watch the new action movie at the cinema this weekend.
I am learning how to play the acoustic guitar by watching free video tutorials online.
We plan to go camping in the forest next month, roast marshmallows, and sleep in tents.
My brother collects old comic books, and his collection is worth a lot of money.
I prefer running outdoors on trails rather than running on a treadmill inside.
Do you want to play a board game or a card game with us tonight at my house?
I bought this shirt yesterday, but it is too small for me, so I want to exchange it for a large.
This clothing store is having a huge sale with fifty percent off all shoes today.
Where is the fitting room? I want to try on these blue jeans and this sweater.
I need to buy groceries like fresh vegetables, fruit, eggs, and milk today.
This leather jacket is very expensive, but the quality is incredibly good.
Can I return this item and get a full refund if I still have the paper receipt?
The shopping mall is always crazy crowded on Friday nights and weekends.
I need to buy a nice suit and a tie for my friend's wedding next week.
These running shoes are very comfortable, light, and perfect for marathon training.
I don't like shopping online because returning items that don't fit is a hassle.
I have a huge history exam tomorrow morning, so I need to study all night in the library.
My professor is very nice and always answers my questions clearly after class ends.
I am taking four classes this semester: math, chemistry, English literature, and ASL.
Where can I buy the required textbook for the introduction to biology course?
Our teacher assigned a group project that is due next Monday afternoon.
I received an A grade on my research paper, and I am so happy and relieved.
The university library is a perfect place to study because it is always completely quiet.
I missed class yesterday because I overslept my alarm clock, can I borrow your notes?
I am studying sign language because I want to become a certified interpreter in the future.
Graduation is next month, and my whole family is flying here to watch me walk across the stage.
